description_long: This is a stylized adult female figure with exaggeratedly elongated arms raised and bent at the elbows, forming a wide V-shape above her head. She is dressed in a sleeveless top with a fitted cut and a pair of straight-leg pants, complemented by simple shoes. The figure's facial features are defined, and her hair is styled in a neat, medium-length cut. The arms are notably disproportionate, extending far above and outward from the body, which gives the figure a surreal and attention-grabbing appearance. The clothing fits closely to the body, and the shoes are flat and practical. The overall posture is upright, with the arms dramatically elevated, suggesting a dynamic or expressive gesture.
description: A stylized adult female figure with extremely elongated, raised arms, wearing a sleeveless top, pants, and flat shoes, standing upright.
description_view_0: Front view showing the figure's face, sleeveless top, and the dramatic V-shape formed by the raised, elongated arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the fitted top, and the extreme length and upward angle of the left arm.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the back of the top and pants, and the arms crossing in a V-shape above the shoulders.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, the fitted top, and the exaggerated upward extension of the right arm.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless fitted top and straight-leg pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms raised and bent outward
